title: dysoxylum hongkongense
intro: Dysoxylum hongkongense, also known as Hong Kong dysoxylum or Hong Kong dyso, is a species of flowering plant in the family Meliaceae. It is a deciduous tree native to southern China, specifically in Hong Kong, and is valued for its medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. Dysoxylum hongkongense is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
